name: taqat-techno-plugins
description: Professional development skills for Claude Code - Odoo ERP, Azure DevOps, PM best practices, document conversion, video creation, and more

plugins.name: odoo-upgrade
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo module upgrade assistant for migrating between Odoo versions (14-19)

plugins.name: odoo-frontend
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo website theme development with auto-detection, MCP integration, and Bootstrap version management

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps integration - manage work items, PRs, pipelines, repos, wiki through natural language via MCP server

plugins.name: ntfy-notifications
plugins.description: Push notifications to your phone via ntfy.sh when Claude completes tasks, needs input, or encounters errors. 100% FREE - No account required!

plugins.name: odoo-report
plugins.description: Professional Odoo Email Templates and QWeb Reports - Complete toolkit for creating, managing, and debugging email templates and PDF reports across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: pandoc
plugins.description: Universal document conversion powered by Pandoc - Convert between 50+ input and 60+ output formats including PDF, Word, HTML, EPUB, LaTeX, and presentations

plugins.name: remotion
plugins.description: Create professional videos with smooth voice narration using Remotion and Claude Code. Free edge-tts voices, continuous audio pipeline, full video creation from text prompts.

plugins.name: odoo-test
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo testing toolkit - generate test skeletons, run tests with formatted output, create mock data, and analyze test coverage across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: odoo-security
plugins.description: Odoo security audit toolkit - verify access rules, audit route auth, analyze sudo() usage, and generate security reports with risk scoring

plugins.name: odoo-i18n
plugins.description: Odoo internationalization toolkit - extract translatable strings, validate translations, find missing translations, and manage Arabic/RTL localization across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: odoo-service
plugins.description: Complete Odoo server lifecycle manager - start, stop, deploy, initialize, and manage Odoo across local venv, Docker, and any IDE for Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: odoo-docker
plugins.description: Docker infrastructure manager for Odoo - production deployment with nginx, CI/CD pipelines, performance tuning, multi-version image management, and container debugging for Odoo 14-19 Enterprise

plugins.name: paper
plugins.description: UI/UX design specialist - design screens, wireframes, and design systems for web, mobile, and desktop. Includes Figma MCP integration, WCAG accessibility, and Odoo/Bootstrap theme support

plugins.name: pm-guidelines
plugins.description: Cross-project PM best practices enforcement - status labels, bilingual parity, secret detection, source file protection, dashboard quality, and session discipline. 10 hooks, 6 skills, 2 agents.
